provenance: Generated by the OFFICIAL NVIDIA FLIP `flip-evaluator` pip package (compiled nbflip.abi3.so), HDR mode: flip_evaluator.evaluate(ref, test, 'HDR', inputsRGB=False, applyMagma=False, parameters={'ppd': 67}).
